runtime_proof.note: Domain-only forcePromote exception runtime with live DB smoke required for T1. No schema, repository, API, or worker paths were modified by this lane.

assertions: malformed forcePromote with blank reason fails closed and emits no exceptionRecord
valid forcePromote over a suppressed pick qualifies and emits immutable DecisionRecord provenance
suppression reasons bypassed by the exception are replay-visible in evidence

re-settling a settled pick creates correction without duplicate base rows
correction chain is additive and original settlement row is not mutated
